title: Quantum Computing
body: Quantum computing uses qubits that can exist in superposition states, enabling parallel computation.

title: Cookie Recipe
body: The best chocolate chip cookie recipe requires brown butter and resting the dough for 36 hours.

title: React Hooks
body: React hooks like useState and useEffect replaced class components for managing state.

title: French Revolution
body: The French Revolution of 1789 was caused by financial crisis and social inequality.

title: ML Overfitting
body: Machine learning models can overfit training data when model complexity is too high.

title: Meditation
body: Daily meditation for 20 minutes reduces cortisol levels and improves working memory.

title: PostgreSQL
body: PostgreSQL supports JSONB columns with GIN indexes for fast semi-structured queries.

title: Hubble Telescope
body: The Hubble Space Telescope orbits Earth at 547 km altitude, completing one orbit every 95 minutes.

title: Meeting Notes
body: Effective meeting notes should capture decisions, action items, and key discussion points.

title: CRISPR
body: CRISPR-Cas9 gene editing works by guiding molecular scissors to a specific DNA sequence.
